reasoning: FSIS recalls typically involve a lengthy timeline for official closure on their website, often taking anywhere from 4 to over 12 months. This is because after the physical recall of the product is complete, FSIS conducts effectiveness checks and goes through an administrative review via the District Office and RMTAD. Since the recall was issued on April 5, 2025, a closure before July 1, 2025 leaves less than 3 months (approx 87 days) for the entire process to conclude and be formally updated on the website. Thus, a resolution within this short timeframe is unlikely based on the base rate of FSIS organizational behavior.
